brand.name: MediMind
auth.leftTagline: Understand your medical notes in a clearer, structured way.
auth.disclaimer: Educational support only — not medical advice.
landing.hero.title: Understand your health information with confidence
landing.hero.desc: MediMind helps you learn and remember important health information through AI summaries, interactive quizzes, and personal reflections — designed for everyone.
landing.support.title: How Medi-Mind supports your learning
landing.support.ai.title: AI Summaries
landing.support.ai.desc: Turn complex medical notes into clear, easy-to-understand summaries tailored to your needs.
landing.support.quiz.title: Interactive Quizzes
landing.support.quiz.desc: Test your knowledge with supportive quizzes that help you remember important health information.
landing.support.reflection.title: Personal Reflections
landing.support.reflection.desc: Write down your thoughts and track your confidence as you learn at your own pace.
landing.designed.title: Designed for everyone
landing.designed.allAges.title: All ages welcome
landing.designed.allAges.desc: Whether you're young or older, Medi-Mind adapts to your learning needs.
landing.designed.cognitive.title: Cognitive support
landing.designed.cognitive.desc: Simple design with large text, clear buttons, and reduced visual clutter for easier understanding.
landing.designed.carers.title: Carers and families
landing.designed.carers.desc: Help loved ones understand their health with shared learning tools.
landing.safe.title: Safe, secure, and trustworthy
landing.safe.desc: Your health information is private and protected. Medi-Mind is designed for educational purposes to help you understand and remember health information. It is not a replacement for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
landing.safe.note: Always consult with your healthcare provider about your health concerns and treatment options.
landing.cta.title: Start learning with confidence today
landing.cta.desc: Join Medi-Mind and take control of your health education journey.
faq.title: FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers to what most people ask before trying MediMind Lite.
faq.1.a: I’m a web app that helps you understand medical notes and health information in clearer, structured language. I focus on readability, calm design, and confidence-building explanations.
faq.2.a: No. I’m educational support only. I help you understand what you already have (like notes or instructions), but I don’t diagnose or replace clinicians.
faq.3.q: What can I upload or paste?
faq.3.a: In the prototype stage, I recommend using dummy text or non-sensitive examples. Later, I’ll support more input types with clearer privacy guidance.
faq.4.q: How is it different from other apps?
faq.4.a: Many apps focus on reminders. I focus on understanding: structured summaries, clear explanations, and user-friendly presentation designed for accessibility.
faq.5.a: Yes — the UI includes a language selector now. Full language switching can be implemented in the front-end with i18n (and optionally supported by the backend).
about.title: About MediMind Lite
about.body: I built MediMind Lite to make health information easier to understand — especially when medical language feels overwhelming. My goal is to turn complex notes into calm, structured explanations that support learning and confidence. I’m privacy-aware by design, and I’m clear about boundaries: I support understanding, not diagnosis.
about.1.title: Trust & clarity
about.1.desc: I focus on readable layout, clear headings, and gentle guidance that works for different ages and abilities.
about.2.title: Security & privacy
about.2.desc: Designed to avoid risky patterns. In prototypes, I encourage dummy data, and later I can enforce safer handling end-to-end.
about.3.title: Built to grow
about.3.desc: Structured so you can add features later (dashboard, uploads, AI pipeline, multilingual support).

terms.title: Conditions of Use
terms.intro: MediMind Lite is an educational support tool designed to help users understand medical notes in clearer language. It does not provide medical diagnosis or treatment advice.
terms.notMedicalAdviceBody: Always consult a qualified healthcare professional for medical concerns. If you believe you have an emergency, contact emergency services immediately.
terms.acceptableUseBody: You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to access other users’ data, or upload content that is unlawful or harmful.
terms.contactBody: If you have questions about these terms, contact the project owner.
conditions.title: Conditions of Use
conditions.educationalBody: MediMind Lite is designed to support learning and understanding. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
conditions.medicalAdviceTitle: Not a replacement for healthcare professionals
conditions.medicalAdviceBody: Always speak with a qualified healthcare professional about symptoms, medication, treatment decisions, or personal health concerns.
conditions.userResponsibilityBody: You are responsible for the information you choose to enter and for using the platform safely and appropriately.
conditions.accuracyBody: AI-supported explanations may not always be complete or correct. Check important information with reliable sources or a healthcare professional.
privacy.title: Privacy Notice
privacy.collectBody: We may store your account details, such as your email address, and the text you choose to submit so you can use the service and view your history.
privacy.whyBody: We use this information to provide the service, support authentication, save your history, display your dashboard, and improve the learning experience.
privacy.securityBody: Passwords should be stored securely as hashes, not plain text. Access to saved information should be restricted to logged-in users.
privacy.rightsBody: You can request help with your account information or ask for your account and stored notes to be deleted.
problem.hero.desc: Millions of people make important decisions about their health while feeling confused, overwhelmed, or unsure. MediMind Lite was created to make health information easier to understand.
problem.challenges.title: Real challenges people face
problem.challenges.subtitle: These are common problems for patients, students, carers, and families trying to understand health information.
problem.card.1.title: Information Overload
problem.card.1.quote: I searched my symptoms online and ended up more scared and confused than when I started.
problem.card.1.desc: The internet is full of medical content, but not all of it is reliable, personalised, or easy to understand. People often spend hours reading dense articles, conflicting advice, and clinical language that was never written for them.
problem.card.2.title: The Jargon Wall
problem.card.2.quote: My discharge notes might as well have been written in another language.
problem.card.2.desc: Medical terms can create a barrier between professionals and the people trying to understand their care. Words like myocardial infarction, idiopathic, or pharmacokinetics can feel intimidating without clear explanations.
problem.card.3.title: Low Confidence and Anxiety
problem.card.3.quote: I nodded at everything the doctor said, but I had no idea what was happening.
problem.card.3.desc: When people do not understand health information, they may avoid asking questions, disengage from learning, feel anxious, or leave appointments unsure about what to do next.
problem.why.title: Confusing health information can affect confidence and care
problem.why.desc: When health information is too complex, people may leave appointments unsure, misunderstand instructions, or feel unable to ask questions.
problem.why.itemDesc: Clear explanations can help people feel more prepared and informed.
problem.patient.title: Managing a long-term condition should not feel like a full-time job
problem.patient.desc1: People living with long-term conditions often need to understand appointments, medication, letters, symptoms, and lifestyle advice. That can become overwhelming very quickly.
problem.patient.desc2: MediMind Lite helps by turning difficult information into clear, structured learning that people can revisit at their own pace.
problem.solution.title: There is a better way
problem.solution.desc: MediMind Lite does not replace professional medical advice. It supports learning by helping people understand, remember, and reflect on health information.
features.hero.title: Learn health smarter with tools that make information clearer
features.hero.desc: MediMind Lite helps users understand health information through notes, summaries, reflections, quizzes, and confidence tracking.
features.intro.title: Not just features — practical learning support
features.intro.subtitle: Every feature is designed to help people feel less overwhelmed and more confident when learning about health.
features.card.1.title: Health Notes
features.card.1.desc: Transform complex medical documents, discharge letters, or study materials into clean, structured notes automatically.
features.card.1.bullet.2: Highlights key medical terms with simple definitions
features.card.1.bullet.3: Syncs across devices when you log in
features.card.2.title: Personal Health Reflections
features.card.2.desc: Write about your symptoms, concerns, moods, and progress. MediMind Lite uses prompts to help you explain what matters before appointments.
features.card.3.title: Confidence Tracking
features.card.3.desc: Know which topics you understand well and which areas need more attention, so you can build confidence gradually.
features.card.4.title: AI-Powered Summaries
features.card.4.desc: Paste a medical article, report, textbook chapter, or health page and receive a clearer explanation matched to your level.
features.card.4.bullet.3: Designed for patients, students, and carers
features.card.5.title: Auto-Generated Quizzes
features.card.5.desc: Turn your health notes into quizzes in seconds. Spaced repetition helps you review at the right time.
features.how.title: From confusing information to clearer understanding
features.how.step.1.title: Add your content
features.how.step.1.text: Paste notes, medical letters, articles, or study material.
features.how.step.2.title: Learn at your level
features.how.step.2.text: MediMind Lite explains the content clearly and highlights key terms.
features.how.step.3.title: Review and build confidence
features.how.step.3.text: Use quizzes, reflections, and confidence tracking to keep improving.
features.feedback.title: Example early user feedback
features.feedback.subtitle: These example comments show the type of impact MediMind Lite is designed to support.
features.feedback.1.quote: MediMind Lite turned my clinical notes into something I actually understood.
features.feedback.1.name: Amara
features.feedback.2.quote: The summaries helped me feel more prepared before speaking to my consultant.
features.feedback.2.name: David
features.feedback.3.quote: It could help patients engage with educational material more confidently.
features.feedback.3.name: Dr Priya S.
features.cta.title: Ready to experience these features?
features.cta.desc: Join early access and start learning health information with more confidence.
aboutPage.hero.title: Making health information easier to understand
aboutPage.hero.desc: MediMind Lite is an educational health learning platform designed to help people simplify complex medical information, build confidence, and learn at their own pace.
aboutPage.mission.title: Helping people feel less overwhelmed by health information
aboutPage.mission.desc1: Health information can be difficult to understand, especially when it includes unfamiliar terms, long documents, or confusing explanations. MediMind Lite turns complex content into clearer notes, summaries, quizzes, and reflections.
aboutPage.mission.desc2: The goal is not to replace healthcare professionals. The goal is to help users prepare better questions, understand key ideas, and feel more confident when learning about health.
aboutPage.mission.cardTitle: Built for clarity, confidence, and care.
aboutPage.mission.cardDesc: MediMind Lite supports patients, students, carers, and curious learners who want health information to feel less intimidating and more manageable.
aboutPage.values.title: Designed with responsibility
aboutPage.values.1.title: Education first
aboutPage.values.1.text: MediMind Lite supports learning, revision, reflection, and understanding.
aboutPage.values.2.title: Safety and trust
aboutPage.values.2.text: The app reminds users to speak with qualified professionals about personal health concerns.
aboutPage.values.3.title: Human-centred design
aboutPage.values.3.text: The interface is simple and supportive so users can focus on understanding.
aboutPage.academic.title: Built as a digital health learning project
aboutPage.academic.desc1: MediMind Lite was created as part of an academic digital project exploring how AI-supported learning tools can help people understand health information more clearly.
aboutPage.academic.desc2: It is not a medical device and does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
aboutPage.contact.title: Get in touch with MediMind Lite
aboutPage.contact.desc: For questions about the project, early access, or feedback, you can contact the MediMind Lite team using the details below.
aboutPage.safety.title: Important safety note
aboutPage.safety.desc: MediMind Lite is an educational tool. It does not provide medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment. Always speak to a qualified healthcare professional about personal health concerns, symptoms, medication, or treatment decisions.

forgot.error.passwordRequired: Please enter and confirm your new password.

forgot.error.resetCodeInvalid: The reset code is incorrect. Please check the code and try again.
forgot.error.resetCodeExpired: This reset code has expired. Please request a new code.
forgot.error.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.

forgot.error.passwordNeedsMixedCase: Password must include uppercase and lowercase letters.
forgot.error.passwordNeedsNumber: Password must include at least one number.
forgot.error.passwordNeedsSymbol: Password must include at least one special character.
forgot.error.passwordSameAsOld: Your new password cannot be the same as your current password. Please choose a different password.
forgot.error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
